dealConfig.notes: Value-add opportunity in South Austin. Units have not been renovated since 2010. Interior renovations estimated at $10,000/unit for upgraded finishes, appliances, and flooring. Expected rent premium of $200-300/unit post-renovation. Strong submarket fundamentals with proximity to major employers.
